creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
A possible fix: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D26453

buildworld completes for me with this change.  I don't think I've ever seen the build failure in question in my own builds, so I can't easily verify that this actually solves anything.  Li-Wen, is it possible to try this patch in CI without committing?  I'm not sure how many builds we'd need in order to verify whether the issue is gone.
